summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Grayscale CoinDesk Crypto 5 ETF (GDLC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the CoinDesk 5 index. The fund is a passively managed product that aims to track an index of the top five largest, most liquid, digital assets by market-cap. Holdings are weighted by market-cap, as measured by circulating supply GDLC was launched on Feb 19, 2018 and is issued by Grayscale.
